summary: School website (Mount Paradise Public School) with English language interface, gallery, admissions info, and registration form

existing_features.title: Convert all Hindi text content to English across all pages including Home, About, Academics, Admissions, Gallery, Contact, and Registration pages

Update the Header navigation menu items from Hindi to English: replace 'मुख्य पृष्ठ' with 'Home', 'हमारे बारे में' with 'About', 'शैक्षिक' with 'Academics', 'प्रवेश' with 'Admissions', 'गैलरी' with 'Gallery', 'संपर्क' with 'Contact', and 'छात्र पंजीकरण' with 'Student Registration'
Convert the Home page hero section, feature cards, and CTA buttons to English including school tagline, quality education description, and all button text
Translate the About page mission, vision, educational approach, and core values sections from Hindi to English
Convert the Academics page curriculum tabs (primary, middle, secondary) and subject listings from Hindi to English
Translate the Admissions page enrollment process steps and contact information from Hindi to English
Convert the Gallery page category labels and image titles from bilingual Hindi/English to English only
Translate the Contact page section headings, office hours, and form instructions from Hindi to English
Convert the Registration form field labels, placeholders, section headings, and validation messages from Hindi to English
Update the ContactForm component submission success message and field labels from Hindi to English
Translate the Footer quick links, contact information labels, and social media section from Hindi to English

new_feature_requests.summary: Convert website language from Hindi to English
